title: Phase 2 tests: coordinator + tasks subsystem [CC parity]
description:
## Goal

Implement Rust tests covering the behavioral spec produced by Phase 1 (#532). Pin down every contract listed in that spec with at least one test case.

Parent audit: #523.

## Blocked on

- Phase 1 spec issue #532. Do not start until that body contains the markdown spec.

## Where the tests live

- `src/coordinator/task_queue.rs` — `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` for depends_on, cycle rejection
- `src/coordinator/teammate.rs` — tests for palette cycling, struct invariants
- `src/coordinator/permission.rs` — tests for permission bridge queue
- `src/coordinator/mod.rs` — single test asserting `dispatch()` returns `NotImplemented` until #507

## Test plan skeleton

- Read the spec at #532.
- For each behavior bullet: add a `#[test]` (or `#[tokio::test]`) named after the behavior.
- For pure functions: `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` colocated in the same source file.
- For multi-module / cross-process / SSE / HTTP: `tests/<subsystem>_integration.rs`.
- Use `tempfile::TempDir` for filesystem isolation.
- Use `wiremock` (already in deps) for HTTP fakes; avoid network IO.
- Property tests (`proptest`) for input-parsers where useful.

## Notes
- Coordinator is explicitly Phase 1 per #507 — tests should pin the Phase 1 contract, not the future contract

## Acceptance

- Every Phase 1 behavior bullet has at least one matching test
- `cargo test -p openclaudia` passes cleanly (no `#[ignore]` shortcuts)
- `cargo test --workspace -- --nocapture` shows the new tests by name
- No new clippy warnings (`cargo clippy --tests -- -D warnings`)
- Gap signals from Phase 1 confirmed filed as separate feature issues, not silently bundled here
